objective: Cycle 17 — Bug hunt C16 (found 2 bugs: echo_memory + tension_zone missing from LLM) + fix BUG-027/028 + feat 3rd GM few-shot example
checkpoint: Bug hunt C16 (merlin_llm_adapter.gd + llm_adapter_prompts.gd): found 2 bugs. BUG-027 HIGH: echo_memory cross-run data (deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen, total_runs) was claimed wired in C16 status but code was never modified. Fixed: build_narrative_context() now extracts echo_memory from meta, build_context_enrichment() formats veteran status, death memory, and faction allegiance history. BUG-028 MEDIUM: tension_zone/convergence_zone from MOS not injected into LLM prompts. Fixed: tension_zone mapped to narrative pacing hints (FIN IMMINENTE, Tension haute, etc.). Feature: 3rd few-shot JSON example in GM system prompt (end-game with PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep ±15-20). 3 files modified, 53 lines changed. 28 total bugs fixed across 17 cycles.
